source_pr.title: *: enable race test on util/chunk and update bazel config
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #35234

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

1、Enable race test in the util/chunk
2、run ```gazelle``` to update bazel config
3、add 3min test timeout. 

     Q: Why is the timeout 3min. 
     A: Because the unit test speeds 3min to complete it.
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: *: enable race test on util/chunk and update bazel config
failure_signature: *: enable race test on util/chunk and update bazel config
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR enables `-race` for util/chunk in Bazel and updates build configs/timeouts. It improves test coverage and CI ergonomics, but does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a specific root-cause stabilization for an intermittent failure in the code under test.
fix_pattern: Bazel test infra: enable `-race` for util/chunk, run gazelle updates, and adjust test timeouts (coverage/infra change, not a targeted flaky fix).

evidence: evidence: *: enable race test on util/chunk and update bazel config
